programme.title: Rick Renner
programme.desc: God wants to reveal His will to you by His spirit, so don't excuse ignorance when truth is available.

programme.title: Faith Is the Victory
programme.desc: Mark and Trina Hankins share messages about faith, helping believers understand their identity in Christ and the Holy Spirit's role in their lives.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Healthy living doesn't start where you think it does. Learn how to think in agreement with God for better mental health and enjoyment in life.

programme.title: The Nicole Crank Show
programme.desc: Nicole Crank, the pastor of Faith Church in Missouri, talks about faith and everyday topics with her guests.

programme.title: Stakelbeck Tonight
programme.desc: Host Erick Stakelbeck takes viewers around the world; from Jerusalem to London to Washington, D.C., pointing beyond with cutting-edge commentary, analysis and interviews focusing on ever-changing events and why they matter.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: In Empty Out the Negative, Joel Osteen provides us with biblical tools to combat negative thoughts and feelings that weigh us down so that we can have the abundant life that we were meant to live.

programme.title: Worship With The Binions and Friends
programme.sub-title: Martha Munizzi, Mary Alessi, Jonathan and Jason Nels
programme.desc: David and Nicole Binion host dynamic nights of worship with live music from top gospel artists.

programme.title: Jesus: The Game Changer
programme.desc: Karl Faase travels to the U.K., U.S., Singapore, India and Australia, interviewing authors, academics and modern-day game changers about how the life and teaching of Jesus changed the world and why it matters.

programme.title: Stop the Pain: The Six to Fix
programme.desc: Dr. Scott Hannen shares how to unlock the body's potential to heal itself.

programme.title: Why Israel Matters
programme.desc: History declares the longstanding presence of Jews in Jerusalem, though outside influences have wrestled to rule this very sacred place since its beginning; a look at the history this city is built upon, and what it has to say to us today.

programme.title: Praise
programme.desc: Featuring the contemporary Christian music and worship, ministry voices, interviews from a wide variety of guests and an hour of relevant talk.

programme.title: Life Today
programme.sub-title: Mark and Trina Hankins: Healing and Faith
programme.desc: A ministry couple share their struggles with health and the healing power of faith.
